about.label: About VDH Agency
about.title: Personal. Committed. Results-driven.
about.p1: VDH Agency was founded by Lars van der Hoek with one goal: to truly grow businesses online. No empty promises, just measurable results.
about.p2: At VDH Agency, I am personally involved in every project. You always have one dedicated point of contact and direct communication — without middlemen.

process.label: How we work
process.title: From introduction to growth
process.s1desc: We discuss your goals, challenges and opportunities in a no-obligation conversation.
process.s2desc: We create a tailor-made plan aligned with your goals and budget.
process.s3desc: We get to work with transparent communication and regular updates.
process.s4desc: We measure results, continuously optimise and scale what works.

cta.label: Ready to grow?
cta.title: Let's take your business to the next level together.
cta.sub: Contact us today for a no-obligation conversation.

dienstenPage.label: Our services
dienstenPage.title: Everything you need to grow online
dienstenPage.sub: From SEO to social media and websites — we deliver measurable results.
dienstenPage.seoDesc: Search engine optimisation (SEO) and paid advertising (SEA) are the backbone of online growth. We analyse your market, optimise your website and set up targeted campaigns that convert visitors into customers.
dienstenPage.socialSubtitle: From idea to publication, we handle everything
dienstenPage.socialDesc: Social media management goes beyond posting occasionally. We handle the entire process: from an introductory meeting to understand your brand, to on-location filming, professional video editing and final publication. Consistency plays a major role — it increases the chance that the algorithm picks up your content more often and shows it to a larger audience.
dienstenPage.webDesc: A good website is fast, mobile-friendly and converts visitors into customers. We build custom websites that not only look great but are also technically optimised for search engines.

seoPage.label: SEO & SEA
seoPage.title: More customers via Google — SEO & SEA for SMEs
seoPage.sub: We make sure your business is found by people actively searching for your services.
seoPage.whatP1: SEO (search engine optimisation) ensures your website ranks higher organically in Google — more visitors without paying per click. SEA (search engine advertising) are the paid ads at the top of Google, immediately visible to your target audience.
seoPage.whatP2: The combination of SEO and SEA is powerful: SEA delivers immediate results while SEO builds a sustainable stream of visitors over time. At VDH Agency we combine both strategies, tailored to your budget and goals.
seoPage.whatP3: We always start with a thorough audit of your current situation. Based on that we create a concrete strategy — no vague promises, just a clear plan with measurable KPIs.
seoPage.step1Desc: We fully analyse your website: loading speed, mobile display, structure, technical errors and existing ranking positions.
seoPage.step2Desc: We identify the keywords your target audience actively searches for — focusing on conversion, not just traffic.
seoPage.step3Desc: Titles, meta descriptions, content and internal link structure are optimised for both Google and the reader.
seoPage.step4Desc: We set up targeted campaigns, monitor the budget carefully and optimise weekly based on data.
seoPage.step5Desc: You receive a clear monthly report with rankings, traffic, conversions and planned actions for the next month.
seoPage.faq1Q: How quickly will I see results from SEO?
seoPage.faq1A: SEO is a long-term strategy. Initial improvements in rankings are typically visible after 3-6 months. Within 6-12 months you build a stable stream of organic traffic.
seoPage.faq2Q: How much does SEO or Google Ads cost at VDH Agency?
seoPage.faq2A: Costs depend on your market, goals and desired volume. We work with monthly packages and are transparent about the advertising budget. Request a free quote.
seoPage.faq3Q: Do you guarantee a certain ranking?
seoPage.faq3A: No. Any agency that guarantees ranking positions is lying. Google determines rankings based on hundreds of factors. We guarantee a professional, data-driven approach and transparent reporting.
seoPage.faq4Q: Can I combine SEO and Google Ads?
seoPage.faq4A: Absolutely — and we recommend it. SEA gives immediate visibility while SEO builds. Over time, strong organic presence lowers your total advertising costs.

socialPage.label: Social Media Management
socialPage.title: Social media that works — content that converts
socialPage.sub: From strategy to publication: we fully take your social media off your hands.
socialPage.whatTitle: What does social media management involve?
socialPage.whatP1: Social media management goes beyond posting a photo. It starts with a well-thought-out strategy: which channels does your target audience use, what message resonates, and how do you ensure consistency?
socialPage.whatP2: At VDH Agency we handle the entire process. We start with an introductory meeting to understand your brand, goals and target audience. Then we film on location, professionally edit the content and publish weekly on the right channels at the right time.
socialPage.whatP3: Consistency is the key. The algorithm rewards accounts that regularly post quality content — we make sure you're always visible.
socialPage.step1Desc: We analyse your brand, target audience and competitors. Based on this we create a content calendar for the coming period.
socialPage.step2Desc: We come to you for professional shoots. Whether video content, product photos or behind-the-scenes material — we take care of it.
socialPage.step3Desc: Raw footage is transformed into sharp, brand-consistent content — including subtitles, music and colour correction.
socialPage.step4Desc: Content is published at the optimal time for maximum reach. We monitor responses and adjust strategy based on data.
socialPage.step5Desc: You receive an overview of reach, engagement, growth and recommendations for the next month.
socialPage.faq1Q: Which social media channels do you manage?
socialPage.faq1A: We manage Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn and TikTok. Which channels we use depends on your target audience and goals — we advise you on this free of charge.
socialPage.faq2A: We post a minimum of 3 times per week as standard. The exact frequency is agreed in the strategy based on your goals and budget.
socialPage.faq3Q: Do I still need to do anything myself?
socialPage.faq3A: As little as possible. We fully take care of everything. We ask you to give us access to your channels and be available for the content shoots.
socialPage.faq4Q: How quickly do we see results on social media?
socialPage.faq4A: Growing on social media requires consistency. The first positive results in reach and engagement are typically visible within 4-8 weeks of a consistent approach.

webPage.label: Website Development
webPage.title: A website that sells — fast, beautiful and findable
webPage.sub: Custom-built websites that not only look great but actually generate customers.
webPage.whatP1: A good website is more than a digital business card. It's your best salesperson — active 24/7, always available. But it needs to load fast, be easy to navigate and convince visitors to take action.
webPage.whatP2: At VDH Agency we build websites that perform on all fronts. We start by understanding your business, target audience and goals. Then we design and build a website fully tailored to those needs.
webPage.whatP3: Every website is built with SEO as the foundation: correct structure, fast loading times, mobile optimisation and technical quality. That way your new website scores better from day one than a standard template.
webPage.step1Desc: We discuss your goals, target audience, desired style and functionalities. Based on this we create a concrete proposal.
webPage.step2Desc: We design a unique layout that fits your brand. You see a prototype first — only after your approval do we start building.
webPage.step3Desc: We build the website on modern, stable technology. Clean code, fast loading times and a CMS so you can easily update content yourself.
webPage.step4Desc: All technical SEO elements are built in: metadata, schema markup, sitemap, robots.txt, canonicals and PageSpeed optimisation.
webPage.step5Desc: We ensure a smooth launch and are there during the first weeks to resolve any teething problems.
webPage.faqTitle: Questions about having a website built
webPage.faq1Q: How much does a website cost at VDH Agency?
webPage.faq1A: Costs depend on complexity: a business website starts from a few hundred euros, a more extensive site with webshop or custom functionality requires a larger budget. We always send a free quote first.
webPage.faq2Q: How long does it take to build a website?
webPage.faq2A: A standard business website is typically live within 2-4 weeks. More complex projects take longer. We always agree on a realistic timeline.
webPage.faq3Q: Can I update my website myself after delivery?
webPage.faq3A: Yes. We build with a user-friendly CMS so you can update texts, images and content yourself without technical knowledge.
webPage.faq4Q: Will my website be findable in Google?
webPage.faq4A: We build every website with a strong SEO foundation. Whether you want to actively work on SEO afterwards is your choice — we offer that as a separate service.

overPage.label: About VDH Agency
overPage.title: The story behind VDH Agency
overPage.sub: A passion for digital marketing, a mission to grow businesses.
overPage.storyTitle: Who is Lars van der Hoek?
overPage.p1: I'm Lars van der Hoek, founder of VDH Agency. With a passion for digital marketing I help businesses grow through SEO, social media and custom-built websites.
overPage.p2: At VDH Agency, everything revolves around results. You always work directly with me — no middlemen, no miscommunication, just clear agreements.
overPage.p3: My approach is simple: I get to know your business, set a clear strategy and deliver measurable results. Honest, transparent and results-driven.
overPage.v1desc: We always work with clear KPIs and measurable goals. Results are the only benchmark.
overPage.v2desc: No vagueness or hidden costs. You always know exactly where you stand.
overPage.v3desc: Direct line with Lars. No account managers, no middlemen. Always.
